name: Mimir of the Nordic Ascendant
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ミーミル
desc: Once per turn, at the start of your Standby Phase, if you control a "Nordic" monster and this card is in your GY: You can send 1 Spell from your hand to the GY; Special Summon this card.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, at the start of your Standby Phase, if you control a "Nordic" monster and this card is in your GY: You can send 1 Spell from your hand to the GY; Special Summon this card.
eff: Once per turn, at the start of your Standby Phase, if you control a "Nordic" monster and this card is in your GY: You can send 1 Spell from your hand to the GY; Special Summon this card.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
